message:
test(telemetry): add no-mock JSONL schema validation tests

Add comprehensive tests for JSONL logging/telemetry validation:

pt-telemetry (15 tests):
- RetentionEvent schema validation for all required fields
- All RetentionReason variants (TtlExpired, DiskBudget, etc.)
- Roundtrip fidelity, JSONL format compliance
- Dry-run behavior, disk budget limits, CI artifact generation

pt-core (19 tests):
- ProgressEvent schema validation for all phases
- LogEvent schema validation for all levels and stages
- JsonlWriter output validity (no trailing commas)
- EventBus broadcasting, SessionEmitter, FanoutEmitter

Also exports retention module from pt-telemetry lib.rs.

Bead: process_triage-aii.7.6

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -24,3 +24,5 @@ pt-common = { path = "../pt-common" }
 
 [dev-dependencies]
 tempfile = "3"
+filetime = "0.2"
+serde_json = "1"  # Re-export for test assertions
